COURSE WORKBOOK
with Gretta Van Riel, Rob Ward, Chase Dimond
Richard Li, Nick Shackelford
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

So you’ve fulfilled your end of the deal. You’ve
sent the influencer your product and created a
personalized discount code. Now it’s time for the
influencer to fulfill their end. In this lesson, I’ll teach
you tried and tested ways to follow-up with your
influencers (macro or micro) that will continue a
positive working relationship.
The “Unpaid” Follow-Up
• 	Structure your follow-up like a reminder
• 	Assume positive intent
• 	Compliment them
• 	Stay positive, upbeat and energetic
• 	Be understanding and acknowledge their effort
“Unpaid” Follow-Up Examples
• 	“Just checking in to see if you received the
product. Have you had a chance to have a play
with it yet?”
• 	“I can't wait to see what you create. We just love
your content!”
• 	“I know you're really busy, but we're really
looking forward to seeing what you create.”
• 	“Just checking in to see if there's anything else
you need from our end to continue.”
The “Paid” Follow-Up
• 	Be direct but polite
• 	Send brief reminders
• 	Issue calendar invites
• 	Be polite but persistent
• 	Leverage the power of introductions
LESSON:
MASTERING THE FOLLOW-UP
MODULE:
ADVANCED INFLUENCER
MARKETING
ACTION ITEMS
❏ 	Write 3-5 sample follow-ups for your influencers.
